message:
feat(workflows): support ${trigger} variable substitution in descriptor test_text

Add runtime expansion of ${trigger} placeholders within DescriptorWorkflow
test_text fields. When a conditional branch uses test_text containing
"${trigger}", the placeholder is replaced with the JSON-serialized trigger
value from the workflow context before substring/regex matching is applied.

This enables descriptor workflows to branch on the actual trigger content
(e.g., matching specific command text or event payloads) without requiring
the workflow author to hard-code expected values at definition time.

Also adds a focused regression test (repro_policy_bypass) verifying that
quoted command strings like `"rm" -rf /` are correctly detected as command
candidates by the policy engine.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
